seo.title: Pets x Bridal Sedan Chair Dance – How to Create Video Memes | OpenCreator
seo.description: Make a viral-style pet video meme for Instagram Reels and TikTok: generate a character plus background from text, then edit a base dance clip with video-to-video AI while preserving original motion.
keywords: how to make a meme for instagram

hero.title: Pets x Bridal Sedan Chair Dance
hero.description: Generate a festive character + background from text, then apply them to a base clip to create a viral-style pet dance meme. This workflow is designed for high-speed iteration: swap prompts and quickly produce new variants.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your pet character and the scene
hero.outputImageAlt: Pets x bridal sedan chair dance cover image

steps.title: Write a character prompt
steps.description: Describe the pet character you want (pose, outfit, expression, vibe). The workflow generates a matching character image.

steps.title: Generate a background
steps.description: Create a festive background (New Year / red & gold / stage lighting, etc.) to control the final scene atmosphere.

steps.title: Edit a base clip with Kling o1
steps.description: Use video-to-video to replace the subject and apply the new background while keeping the original dance motion and camera.

steps.title: Export for short-form
steps.description: Download and publish to TikTok/Reels/Shorts as a meme-style promo or brand post.

items.question: What is Pets x Bridal Sedan Chair Dance?
items.answer: It’s a workflow that generates a pet character and background from text prompts, then uses Kling o1 video-to-video to apply them onto a base dance clip.

items.question: Is this text-to-video?
items.answer: Not exactly. The workflow uses text-to-image for character/background, then edits a base clip using video-to-video.

items.question: What models are used?
items.answer: The workflow uses text-to-image models for generating the assets, and Kling o1 for the final video-to-video edit.

items.question: Do I need a base video?
items.answer: Yes. Video-to-video editing needs a base clip for motion and camera. The workflow is optimized for short clips.

items.question: Can I change the character style?
items.answer: Yes. Update the text prompts to change the character, outfit, expression, and the entire scene vibe.

items.question: Can I use it for commercial posts?
items.answer: In general, yes—but ensure you have rights to the base clip and follow provider/platform policies.
